title: Whiter Pale Oak
description: Makes Pale Oak White without the Red Blush, thus GrayScale!
body:
# GrayScale Pale Oak v1.1 (26.1 Update)
Give this project a heart! For more GrayScale packs!

![Image of all the new textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bj5fva8A/images/9b4d129b4a2d68a096731fe2ab16cc179e1c92b7.png)

## What's this?
Do you use pale oak for many builds, but the redish tint makes it stand out or look out of place? Well as an _resourcepack artist_ I fixed it by simply redrawing them in grayscale!
Includes all blocks, items, and boats! Barks on logs and signs are unaffected. 
Here is a list of changed textures and models;

- Pale Oak Planks
- Pale Oak Stairs
- Pale Oak Slab
- Pale Oak Log
- Pale Oak Wood
- Pale Oak Stripped Log
- Pale Oak Stripped Wood
- Pale Oak Door
- Pale Oak Trapdoor
- Pale Oak Fence
- Pale Oak Fence Gate
- Pale Oak Button
- Pale Oak Pressure Plate
- Pale Oak Sign
- Pale Oak Hanging Sign
- Pale Oak Boat
- Pale Oak Chest Boat
- Pale Oak Shelf
- ALL Pale Oak Item models
- Fixed Pale Oak Door model

**Other pack(s)**

Sea Lantern : https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gray-lantern (NEW UPDATE)
## Compatibility
Should work from **1.21.4** to present day. Let me know if there are any issues.

## Credits
All textures has been painted from ground up with accuracy. **GrayScale** logo created by ME
